welcome_offer.description: Limited-time offer: Earn up to 90,000 Bonus Miles: 70,000 Bonus Miles after spending $3,000 in purchases in the first 6 months, plus an additional 20,000 Bonus Miles after spending an additional $2,000 in purchases in the first 6 months. Offer ends 7/15/2026.
notes: Official Delta News Hub and Delta personal card comparison page corroborate the public limited-time offer.
Blue card is not part of this elevated-offer candidate.

welcome_offer: sources/*delta-news*.md:New Delta SkyMiles Gold American Express Card Members can earn 70,000 bonus miles after spending $3,000... plus an additional 20,000 bonus miles after spending an additional $2,000...

open_questions: Confirm the 7/15/2026 expiry remains visible before applying future changes.
Prior review mentioned 50k + $400 statement-credit variant; current adaptor stores official Delta 90k miles tiered offer. Keep conflict tracking active for cash-credit variants.
Confirm 2026-07-15 expiry remains visible before applying.

community.summary: Official Delta sources are canonical for this public limited-time offer. Third-party sources are supporting only. Added 2026-06-30 caveat/refresh monitoring notes.

observations.excerpt: Delta News Hub and personal card page describe up to 90,000 miles for Gold.
TPG current-offers page tracks the same elevated Delta Amex personal offer.
